name: rider-mcp-enforcer
description: Token-efficient tooling for large Unreal C++/Unity/.NET projects: search the codebase through JetBrains Rider's index instead of grep, and analyze huge editor logs — both at ~99% fewer tokens.

plugins.name: rider-mcp-enforcer
plugins.description: Force Claude Code to use Rider's MCP symbol/reference/file index instead of Bash grep, with token-flood summarization. Bundles gamedev-log-analyzer.

plugins.name: gamedev-log-analyzer
plugins.description: Token-efficient game-engine & build log analysis (Unreal/Unity/Godot/MSVC-UBT-MSBuild + JSONL traces), CLI-first: parse, dedup, classify, diff runs, locate file:line, and extract decisive scalar fields over a time window. Also on npm. No IDE required.
